query: change the dev server port from 5173 to 5174; leave everything else untouched.
check: node --check $FILE && node --input-type=module -e "import {readFileSync} from 'node:fs';import a from 'node:assert/strict';const s=readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8');a.ok(/port\s*:\s*5174\b/.test(s),'port 5174 not set');a.ok(!/port\s*:\s*5173\b/.test(s),'old port 5173 still present');a.ok(/plugins\s*:\s*\[\s*vue\s*\(\s*\)/.test(s),'vue plugin removed');" $FILE

query: add a `resolve.alias` mapping the string '@' to the absolute path of the `src/` dir (use `path.resolve(fileURLToPath(new URL('.', import.meta.url)), 'src')` or `path.resolve(__dirname, 'src')` style). Keep existing server and plugins.
check: node --check $FILE && node --input-type=module -e "import {readFileSync} from 'node:fs';import a from 'node:assert/strict';const s=readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8');a.ok(/resolve\s*:\s*\{[\s\S]*?alias\s*:[\s\S]*?['\"]@['\"]/m.test(s),'resolve.alias @ not present');a.ok(/['\"]src['\"]|\bsrc\s*[\)\}]|'\/src'/.test(s),'src path not referenced');a.ok(/plugins\s*:\s*\[\s*vue\s*\(\s*\)/.test(s),'vue plugin removed');" $FILE
